name: Jonah Sable
description: A young man lit by the dials of a jury-rigged transmitter, headphones on one ear, still cueing records for a signal that goes out over a dead city.
background: Ran the graveyard shift on campus radio and never signed off — he keeps the mast broadcasting on scavenged power.
personality: Bright, talkative, and desperate to be heard; he fills silence because silence frightens him.
secret: No one has answered his broadcasts in a long time, and he has started scripting the replies himself to keep going.
notes: T45 · Hillcrest. Skill: radio/comms (T50 radio network). Hook: the invented replies are a heartbreak and a mystery — is anyone really out there?
